title: geranium longipes
intro: Geranium longipes, also known as the long-stalked geranium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Geraniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geranium longipes include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Geranium longipes can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin conditions.
